name: Ukaran R
text: Kingston Engineering College provided me with excellent technical and leadership skills. The faculty support was outstanding.

name: S. Praveenkumar
text: The infrastructure and lab facilities at KEC are world-class. I secured a great position at a top MNC thanks to the training here.

name: Ragul R
text: The placement cell at KEC is very proactive and helped me get placed in my dream company.
